肝膽胰癌多專科團隊會議
2026年7月23日(星期四)  07:30-08:30
聯絡人：暫無專職個管師
肝膽胰癌　召集人：張正雄醫師　核心成員：一般外科李岳聰醫師、林建華醫師；消化內科陳忠宏醫師、王俊偉醫師；影像診斷科張哲維醫師；病理科賴義雄醫師；核醫科侯柏年醫師；放射腫瘤科劉育昌醫師、林伯儒醫師
肝膽胰癌
2026年7月23日(星期四)
5033590 林○見 復發轉移複雜案例 男性，84 歲 VS 陳忠宏醫師肝膽胰癌
HCC, S7, diagnosed before 2022, s/p RFA, with PVT, with rec, 2025, s/p RFA, s/p TACE, s/p HAIC x 1, s/p incomplete RT 250 cGy, under Lenvatinib, with right adrenal metastasis, cM1, s/p RFA(2026/05/26)
現病史84-year-old man with chronic hepatitis C and history of HCC s/p prior RFA developed recurrent/progressive liver lesions over right hepatic lobe/S7 with suspected PVT on serial MRI/ultrasound studies since 2024-2025. He underwent TACE/HAIC/lipiodol embolization and was noted to have enlarging right adrenal mass. Echo-guided biopsy of right adrenal tumor on 2026-05-26 confirmed metastatic hepatocellular carcinoma.
過去病史HCV(+) CVA(+) Chronic hepatitis C, hepatocellular carcinoma, cerebral infarction, reflux esophagitis LA grade A, superficial gastritis, GI bleeding, arrhythmia. Alcohol: occasional drinking.
癌指數AFP： 3.62(2024-12-18)→3.60(2025-02-17)→4.10(2025-03-06)→3.43(2025-05-21)→3.97(2025-08-26)→3.23(2025-11-05)→2.94(2025-12-02)→3.26(2026-01-20)→3.34(2026-04-14)→3.12(2026-05-18)
PIVKA-II： 579.0(2023-12-19)→148.0(2025-03-06)→177.0(2025-12-04)→731.0(2026-04-16)
病理2026-05-26： Right adrenal gland — metastatic hepatocellular carcinoma. IHC: HepPar-1(+), Arginase-1(focal+), CK(weak+), Melan A(-), Synaptophysin(-).
檢查MRI(2025-11-18)
Abdominal MRI with Primovist: Regression and decreased enhancement of previous S7 hypervascular region with lipiodol retention, compatible with post-treatment HCC with PVTT.SONO(2026-03-17)
Abdominal US: Heterogeneous lesion about 5.0×2.0 cm over S6; hypoechoic lesion 3.8×3.5 cm over right adrenal area.CT(2026-04-01)
Newly onset of a 3.5*3.1cm right subphrenic heterogeneous nodular lesion noteSONO(2026-05-25)
Abdominal US: Hypoechoic mass 4.1×3.0 cm over right adrenal area.MRI(2026-06-09)
Abdominal MRI: Peripheral enhancement over previous right subphrenic nodular lesion compatible with treated metastatic HCC s/p treatment; regression of prior S7 lesion with lipiodol retention.
治療Lenvatinib
since 2025/03/05 till nowHAIC (Cis + 5-FU + Mitomycin C)
2025/05/22Incomplete RT
250 cGy , 2025/05/29RFA to adrenal gland
術中出現arrhythmia，未能完全依原計畫持續消融。改追加 percutaneous ethanol injection therapy（PEIT）：99.5% ethanol 24 mL。
討論HCC, with rec, s/p RFA + TACE + HAIC, now with newly cM1, s/p RFA, under Lenvatinib
後續治療方針
影像討論治療策略討論

1578886 楊○萍 首次討論複雜案例 女性，43 歲 VS 林建華醫師肝膽胰癌
Well-differentiated neuroendocrine tumor of pancreas, s/p distal pancreatectomy, splenectomy, left hemicolectomy (2026-06-23), pT4N1, margins cannot be assessed
現病史43-year-old woman presented with poor intake, vomiting, and upper abdominal pain for 2-3 weeks. CT abdomen on 2026-06-16 showed a large heterogeneous mass in the anterior para-renal space compressing pancreas, celiac trunk, portal vein, and stomach with suspected spleen and colon invasion. Exploratory laparotomy with distal pancreatectomy, splenectomy, and left hemicolectomy was performed on 2026-06-23, and pathology revealed well-differentiated neuroendocrine tumor, G2, pT4N1.
過去病史Nil
癌指數AFP： 34.20(2026-06-17)
CA19-9： 59.30(2026-06-17)
CEA： 4.16(2026-06-17)
病理2026-06-18： Stomach, upper body — erosive gastritis with marked chronic inflammation, no evidence of malignancy. Helicobacter pylori absent.2026-06-23： Pancreas, distal pancreatectomy — well-differentiated neuroendocrine tumor, G2, 21x15.4x9.2 cm. Ki-67 proliferation index around 6%, mitotic count <2. Lymphovascular permeation present. Perineural invasion not identified. Tumor invades adjacent organs (stomach, spleen, colon, adrenal gland) (T4). Margins cannot be assessed. LN status: 1/3 involved with extranodal extension. Stage: pT4N1. IHC: cytokeratin(+), synaptophysin(+), SSTR2A(+), chromogranin A focally weak(+), beta-catenin nuclear stain(-), p53 questionable.
檢查SONO(2026-06-16)
Abdominal ultrasound: Heterogeneous abdominal masses measuring about 15.1x10.5 cm and 13.1x8.4 cm. Portal hypertension with collateral vessel dilatation.Endoscopy(2026-06-16)
Upper GI panendoscopy: Hyperemic gastric mucosa with suspected outer compression, severe gastric varices, ulcerative lesion at upper body s/p biopsy, deep duodenal bulb ulcer.CT(2026-06-16)
CT abdomen with contrast: Lobulated heterogeneous enhanced mass in anterior para-renal space causing compression of pancreas, celiac trunk, portal vein, and stomach with suspected spleen and colon invasion. Engorged venous return over epigastric region and splenomegaly suggesting portal hypertension. Preliminary imaging staging T3N0M0.
治療Distal pancreatectomy + splenectomy + left hemicolectomy(2026-06-23)
討論分期及討論後續治療策略。

5021358 黃○清 複雜案例 男性，73 歲 VS 劉大智醫師、張竣期醫師肝膽胰癌
Poorly differentiated adenocarcinoma involving right lower lung/right subphrenic region with liver invasion and mediastinal lymphadenopathy, cT4N2M1, with malignant cells from right lower lobe imprint cytology and liver metastasis by biopsy, associated malignant pleural effusion
現病史73-year-old male presented with fever, dyspnea, and right pleural effusion. Imaging disclosed a large right lung base/right subphrenic mass with suspected liver invasion and mediastinal lymphadenopathy. Bronchoscopic biopsy from right lower lobe showed atypical cells positive for CK/CK7/TTF-1, and CT-guided liver biopsy confirmed adenocarcinoma.
過去病史DM(+) CAD(+) COPD(+) COPD, benign prostatic hyperplasia, atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary artery without angina pectoris, DM
癌指數CA19-9： 1865.00(2026-05-11)
CEA： 22.90(2026-05-11)
SCC Ag： 2.00(2026-05-11)
AFP： <0.91(2026-05-11)
病理2026-05-14： Right lower lobe lung, bronchoscopy with EBUS guide sheath biopsy — atypical cells with chronic inflammation and fibrous tissue. IHC: CK(+), CK7(+), TTF-1(+). Acid fast stain negative.2026-05-14： BAL cytology — negative for malignant cells.2026-05-27： Liver, CT-guided biopsy — adenocarcinoma. Tumor with solid/glandular structure and fibrous stroma. Mucin stain(+). IHC: CK(+), CK7(+), TTF-1(-), Arginase(+ in normal liver tissue), HepPar-1(+ in normal liver tissue).2026-05-27： Imprint bronchial biopsy, right lower lobe — positive for malignant cells.2026-06-09： Right pleural effusion cytology — negative for malignant cells.
檢查SONO(2026-05-06)
Abdominal ultrasound: Heterogeneous liver mass over right lobe measuring about 7.3 × 4.4 cm. Right pleural effusion.CT(2026-05-11)
Abdomen CT with contrast: Large right subphrenic/right lung base mass suspicious for malignancy with metastatic involvement and possible liver invasion. Posterior mediastinal lymphadenopathy. Pleural thickening and minimal pleural effusion.CT(2026-05-12)
Chest CT with contrast: Large heterogeneously enhancing mass lesion (101.7 × 51.3 mm) at right lung base/right subphrenic region with suspected invasion to superior liver. Multiple mediastinal and subcarinal soft tissue masses/lymphadenopathy suspicious for metastatic disease. Pleural thickening with minimal pleural effusion. Bilateral lower lung honeycombing fibrosis.MRI(2026-05-13)
Brain MRI: No intracranial metastasis identified.Bone scan(2026-05-13)
Whole body bone scan: No evidence of osseous metastasis.Echo(2026-06-09)
Chest echo for pleural effusion: Small to moderate amount of right nonseptated complex pleural effusion with lower lung collapse; 270 mL turbid brown fluid drained.X-Ray(2026-06-11)
Chest X-ray: Opacity in right lung and nonspecific left lung infiltrates. Port-A catheter in upper chest.Echo(2026-06-12)
Chest echo for pleural effusion: Moderate amount of right nonseptated complex pleural effusion with lower lung collapse; 590 mL turbid brown fluid drained.
討論Pneumonia (Stenotrophomonas maltophilia and Pseudomonas aeruginosa) => antibiotics (levofloxacin on 2026/6/12). Repeat thoracentesis drained 590 mL of turbid brown fluid. After palliative care consultation => DNR => AAD for home hospice care
